title: ChromiumCraft
description: A modpack that lets you browse the internet in Minecraft through WebDisplays
body:
### **ChromiumCraft**
**Browse the web—without leaving Minecraft.**

ChromiumCraft is a modpack that embeds a fully functional **Chromium-based browser** into Minecraft using **MCEF (Minecraft Chromium Embedded Framework)**. Need to check a recipe? Watch a tutorial? Stream something? Now you can do it all in-game—**no alt-tabbing required.**

Designed for performance, so your gameplay stays lag-free. Because who says you can’t multitask in Minecraft?
